dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Initial Dose Recommended Dose Maximum Dose Schizophrenia – adults (2.1) 10 to 15 mg/day 10 to 15 mg/day 30 mg/day Schizophrenia – adolescents (2.1) 2 mg/day 10 mg/day 30 mg/day Irritability associated with autistic disorder – pediatric patients (2.4) 2 mg/day 5 to 10 mg/day 15 mg/day Tourette’s disorder – (2.5) Patients <50 kg 2 mg/day 5 mg/day 10 mg/day Patients ≥50 kg 2 mg/day 10 mg/day 20 mg/day •Oral formulations: Administer once daily without regard to meals (2)
